mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kb_document WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT * FROM kb_document WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kb_document WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document (category_id, title, summary, content, content_size, source_type, source_id, project_id, author_id, last_editor_id, version_no, status, view_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{contentSize}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{projectId}, #{authorId}, #{lastEditorId}, #{versionNo}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document SET category_id = #{categoryId}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kb_document SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kb_document SET yjs_state = #{yjsState} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT yjs_state FROM kb_document WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document SET content = #{content}, content_size = #{contentSize}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
